scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.docker:test: docker compose up --build -d && cd e2e && npx playwright test --config=playwright.docker.config.js && cd .. && docker compose down
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../e2e && npm install
